items.title: You'll Never Trust Another USB Cable After Hearing This 🐍 Darknet Diaries | Ep. 161: MG
items.author: Jack Rhysider
items.content:
<article>What if a USB cable could take complete control of your PC or phone? Hackers use them. Governments are using them. And it's all thanks to one security pro known only as "MG."

Visit https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/161/ for a list of sources, full transcripts, and to listen to all episodes.</article>
